message: ../testdata/hocon/subst-tokenize/st-err06-unterminated-string.conf: 1: Expecting a value but got wrong token: 'newline' (JSON does not allow unescaped newline in quoted strings, use a backslash escape) (if you intended 'newline' (JSON does not allow unescaped newline in quoted strings, use a backslash escape) to be part of a key or string value, try enclosing the key or value in double quotes, or you may be able to rename the file .properties rather than .conf)
